review_content.Placements: I am in 2nd year MBBS. There are 100 students in each batch. The internship is provided by the college, and there are no placements in this course. review_content.Infrastructure: The library is available within the campus for all students from 8 AM to 8 PM. Wi-Fi is also provided in the college, library, and hostels. A mess and canteen are available within the campus.

reviews_list.review_title: Good college with nice faculty members and infrastructure; construction is still ongoing.

review_content.Placements: My college, Uma Nath Singh Autonomous State Medical College Jaunpur, currently offers seats for MBBS and paramedical courses. Currently, 4 batches are enrolled in the MBBS course. The quality of teaching is good, and practical facilities are also present.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good in hostels and on campus. The library is open from 8:00 AM till 8:00 PM. Wi-Fi is available at almost every place on campus, such as hostels, lecture theatres, the library, etc. Medical facilities are present within the campus, and one ambulance is always available.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: This might not be the best college, but it is surely not the last option.

review_content.Placements: The senior-most batch here is from 2021, so at present, there are no interns in the college and hospital. But surely in the future, all the interns will be appointed in the hospital, which is attached to the college. A benefit of getting admission here is that this autonomous college has its own hospital inside the campus, which is under construction with a functional OPD.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything from Wi-Fi to the library is available, but yes, there are complete labs and classrooms under construction. Medical facilities are available, but no sports or any kind of extracurricular activities are promoted here as the college lacks a proper ground with sports kits.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of UNS ASMC Jaunpur: Good education, developing infrastructure, and career prospects.

content.Placements: UNS ASMC Jaunpur offers a 1.5-year internship post-MBBS followed by a 2-year bond. This extensive programme provides invaluable clinical experience solidifying theoretical knowledge and developing practical skills. Graduates are well-prepared for the challenges of modern medicine while contributing to healthcare needs in underserved areas.
content.Infrastructure: This college boasts modern infrastructure. A few are under construction, with well-equipped labs for departments. We have 4 lecture theatres. There is Wi-Fi. We have a central library to enhance learning. A canteen is available. The food served in the mess is okay. We have to focus on both theoretical and practical knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty and good hostel.

content.Placements: In MBBS, you get an internship after you complete the whole course in the same college in which you studied. You get a stipend, which is already unannounced by the government. You have to attend postings and night duties, and you can study as well and study from them.
content.Infrastructure: Practical labs are there for some subjects, and for some, they are under construction. A library is also there. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel and in the library. Classrooms are well-spaced. Rooms are well-equipped with one stool, one almirah, one table, one bed, and a balcony.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Growing Building with Strengthening Academics, UNS ASMC Jaunpur.

content.Placements: I am in 2nd year MBBS. There are 100 students in each batch. The internship is provided by the college, and there are no placements in this course. The college provides accommodation for every person here, including students, juniors, seniors, and faculty. An intern hostel is in progress to accommodate final-year students as well.
content.Infrastructure: The library is available within the campus for all students from 8 AM to 8 PM. Wi-Fi is also provided in the college, library, and hostels. Medical rooms have been created in the hostels, equipped with emergency medicine. Sports activities have been started, such as volleyball and badminton. A mess and canteen are available within the campus.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college with nice faculty members and infrastructure; construction is still ongoing.

content.Placements: My college, Uma Nath Singh Autonomous State Medical College Jaunpur, currently offers seats for MBBS and paramedical courses. Currently, 4 batches are enrolled in the MBBS course. The quality of teaching is good, and practical facilities are also present.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good in hostels and on campus. The library is open from 8:00 AM till 8:00 PM. Wi-Fi is available at almost every place on campus, such as hostels, lecture theatres, the library, etc. Medical facilities are present within the campus, and one ambulance is always available.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: This might not be the best college, but it is surely not the last option.

content.Placements: The senior-most batch here is from 2021, so at present, there are no interns in the college and hospital. But surely in the future, all the interns will be appointed in the hospital, which is attached to the college. A benefit of getting admission here is that this autonomous college has its own hospital inside the campus, which is under construction with a functional OPD.
content.Infrastructure: Everything from Wi-Fi to the library is available, but yes, there are complete labs and classrooms under construction. Medical facilities are available, but no sports or any kind of extracurricular activities are promoted here as the college lacks a proper ground with sports kits.

reviews.review_heading: All you need to know about-UNS ASMC JAUNPUR.
reviews.review_text: Currently, the College is under construction so the infrastructure is not that good but yeah it is sufficient for being functional. The college construction is estimated to be completed by August 2025. the quality of food in the mess is okay and the canteen is quite good. No sports and Games though, that's quite depressing. Medical facilities for students are available for free in the hospital.

reviews.review_heading: Teaching and teachers are very good but infrastructure is below average due to construction work.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure at the time is not good due to construction work. Wi-Fi facility is available for classrooms. In the first year, we have labs properly. No labs from the second year. The hostel is good. Food availability is average and the canteen is also average. Medical facilities are good. Sports and games facilities are below average.

reviews.review_heading: This College is Overall Good; Can Take Admission
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is not so good because it is incomplete. Many buildings are still under construction, which looks odd. There are buildings like the inpatient department, outpatient department, academic block, hostel for students, and faculty residence.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for everyone.
reviews.review_text:
Facilities are very supportive and kind; they are very educated and experienced. 
The hostel is separate for both girls and boys. 
Girl hostel is still under construction. 
College is under construction 
Sports ground are not present in the campus. 
Mess is private .

reviews.review_heading: Good for study; you need to come.
reviews.review_text: The mess and facilities are good, with a student-friendly environment. The infrastructure is generally good, with best classrooms and a safe campus. However, sports grounds are not available on campus. The canteen is available, but the infrastructure at Umanath Singh Autonomous Medical College, Jaunpur, is very poor and under construction. The OPD is functional, but the IPD is still not operational.

reviews.review_heading: It's still developing.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are fine. As the college is still developing, everything is under construction. The girls' hostel is being constructed, so we live in SR hostel as of now, which has personal washrooms and a kitchen area. But it's only temporary. The top floor of the boys' hostel is still under construction.

reviews.review_heading: Average government college with good faculty and learning.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is still under construction. Only hostels are completed. The academic block, IPD, everything is under construction. Efficiency of IPD results in a lesser number of patients to learn from. We are hoping the work will be completed by the upcoming year.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a good government college to study medicine.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not up to the mark. It is still under construction. We have lecture theater; for the first year, we have labs. But overall, we have all the basic information that is required for the MBBS course. Talking about the hostel, it is good; we have 24/7 electricity and water supply. The mess food is average.

reviews.review_heading: Poor infrastructure, complete buildings.
reviews.review_text: There are classrooms for the students, free Wi-Fi in the hostel for students to learn new things from the internet. A central library is there for students to study, which remains open till 8 PM. Labs are a negative point, as there are labs only for the first-year students and not beyond that.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied due to unbuild campus but you can take if you have last choice as MBBS.
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure: All basic buildings are under construction, and very few are functional.  
Hostels have Wi-Fi, but most of the time, they don’t have internet.  
Mess food is average, as most of the college's food is, but they are trying to be the worst. Initially, you may feel okay.

highlights.summary: Bhaikaka University, is located in Anand, Gujarat. Established in 2019, it is a private university approved by INC and NMC. Bhaikaka University provides 50 UG, PG and Advanced Masters courses in 34 specialisations, namely Anaesthesia, Anatomy, Biochemistry, Community Medicine and Critical Care Nursing. Theses programmes are offered in Full Time mode. B.Sc., M.Sc., MD, MS and DM are some of the courses offered at Bhaikaka University. Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Medicine & Health Sciences, Science and Nursing. The total fee at Bhaikaka University ranges between INR 25,000 to 1,14,00,000. Bhaikaka University has a student intake of 115 for all the courses. Bhaikaka University offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Pramukhswami Medical College.

review_content.Placements: I don't know much about the internship program. But I heard that, they give a stipend of Rs. 20,000-25,000 per month. If the institute is good, then internships should also be good. Internships are very good and help students to interact with different patients.
review_content.Infrastructure: The lecture halls are very good, big, and air-conditioned. Our laboratories and departments are very well-maintained. There are separate departments for all subjects. The hostel is good. There are four persons in one room. The hostel is 2 floored with around 100 rooms. The food is also very good. There is one activity center where we can do a gym. There are many indoor sports and outdoor sports grounds for cricket and volleyball.

reviews_list.batch_info: MD in Pharmacology - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Proud to be alumni of this college.

review_content.Placements: Everyone gets placed in top pharmaceutical companies or medical colleges after completing this course. Average package is around INR 1 Lakh per month after completing MD Pharmacology from this institute. Students are allowed to undergo 2 month internship during this course in pharmaceutical companies. Top roles offered are medical advisory in pharmaceutical companies. Those who opt for academics can join as tutors or senior residents in medical colleges with good package. Top recruiting companies are Lambda therapeutics research ltd.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: One of the good colleges to do your MBBS.

review_content.Placements: I studied medicine for my MBBS degree. We knew that placement in this field was based on how well we did in NEET PG, so it didn't depend on the university. The university staff was great, and I didn't have any problems studying here. Good luck.
review_content.Infrastructure: The hostel was great, with all the amenities. There were two different hostels according to your budget and requirements. The hostel staff was great, and the food was great. There were no complaints. Water, cleaning, bathrooms, and everything else were great. It was also very close to the college.

reviews_list.review_title: All facilities are very good, and practical learning is also very good here.

review_content.Infrastructure: All classes are very good. All classes are having AC. The infrastructure is very good, with facilities for learning like computers, Wi-Fi, and projectors all things is present. The hostel is very good, and daily cleaning and mopping are done. The light facility is also there.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: I like this college and my field just because of the good atmosphere and staff members.

review_content.Placements: Students who have cleared the NEET exam, then they got the admission here, so everyone is brilliant. The highest salary offered after the study depends upon our skills because medical is the part where you can show your ability. You will get 8 lac after the MBBS course, and 1.3 lac after the PG. PG is the best course. Students who clear NEET PG will get the admission here.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good, and it is a famous college in Gujarat. The hostel is too much good compare to other college hostels with a good dining hall. Our college provides good medical facilities. individual_reviews.title: Review of Pramukhswami Medical College.

content.Placements: I don't know much about the internship program. But I heard that, they give a stipend of Rs. 20,000-25,000 per month. If the institute is good, then internships should also be good. Internships are very good and help students to interact with different patients.
content.Infrastructure: The lecture halls are very good, big, and air-conditioned. Our laboratories and departments are very well-maintained. There are separate departments for all subjects. The hostel is good. There are four persons in one room. The hostel is 2 floored with around 100 rooms. The food is also very good. There is one activity center where we can do a gym. There are many indoor sports and outdoor sports grounds for cricket and volleyball.

individual_reviews.course: MD in Pharmacology - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Proud to be alumni of this college.

content.Placements: Everyone gets placed in top pharmaceutical companies or medical colleges after completing this course. Average package is around INR 1 Lakh per month after completing MD Pharmacology from this institute. Students are allowed to undergo 2 month internship during this course in pharmaceutical companies. Top roles offered are medical advisory in pharmaceutical companies. Those who opt for academics can join as tutors or senior residents in medical colleges with good package. Top recruiting companies are Lambda therapeutics research ltd.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: One of the good colleges to do your MBBS.

content.Placements: I studied medicine for my MBBS degree. We knew that placement in this field was based on how well we did in NEET PG, so it didn't depend on the university. The university staff was great, and I didn't have any problems studying here. Good luck.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel was great, with all the amenities. There were two different hostels according to your budget and requirements. The hostel staff was great, and the food was great. There were no complaints. Water, cleaning, bathrooms, and everything else were great. It was also very close to the college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: All facilities are very good, and practical learning is also very good here.

content.Placements: 100% of students are placed. The highest package is 20 LPA and the lowest package is 10 LPA. No companies are recruiting, There are all 100% but all students get internships from this institute and course. The internship is very interesting in this course.
content.Infrastructure: All classes are very good. All classes are having AC. The infrastructure is very good, with facilities for learning like computers, Wi-Fi, and projectors all things is present. The hostel is very good, and daily cleaning and mopping are done. The light facility is also there.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: I like this college and my field just because of the good atmosphere and staff members.

content.Placements: Students who have cleared the NEET exam, then they got the admission here, so everyone is brilliant. The highest salary offered after the study depends upon our skills because medical is the part where you can show your ability. You will get 8 lac after the MBBS course, and 1.3 lac after the PG. PG is the best course. Students who clear NEET PG will get the admission here.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is good, and it is a famous college in Gujarat. If you want to know about our college, then you will search, and I am sure you will get the best feedback. Our college provides a library, a good lecture hall and physical facilities. reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, faculty members, events and placement

review_content.Placements: This a government-funded college for veterinary Science. According to new VCI syllabus, the course duration is five and a half year, and after completion of your course you will become a veterinary doctor, and you can apply for the jobs in both government as well as private sectors. Also, you can apply for the jobs in the Indian army and other graduate-level jobs. If you want to continue the study, you can do PG, or you can apply for MBA.
review_content.Infrastructure: This college has a good infrastructure. This college has 18 departments with well-facilitated labs, and it also has a library which is situated in the university (Orrisa University of Agriculture and Technology) to which this college belongs which is located within 200 meters away from the college. Here you can also take the advantage of free medical check-up in our health center, and it also has a race court of horses for NCC cadets. You can also take the chance of free horse riding skills ( only for NCC cadets). Different sports games are also arranged on annually, and you can also play different indoor and outdoor games in our sports complex like basketball, volleyball, cricket, carrom, badminton etc. The quality of labs and classrooms is good, and it is also providing smart classroom systems. Although there is no AC in the classrooms but there are sufficient fans. Each classroom consists of maximum 95 students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Veterinary Sciences and Animal Husbandry - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Veterinary College review of Mizoram.

review_content.Placements: 90 percent of students were placed in job. The highest salary offered was 1 Lacs. We got job of Veterinary officer and many got the job of professor after finishing their MVSc. 100 percent of students got internship from our college. The highest stipend offered was Rs 24000 and the lowest stipend offered was Rs 12000. There is no placement cell though.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is good and there are every facilities available. The labs have all equipment in adequate number and library has all sorts of books in adequate number. Medical facilities are good here and there is also provision for playing different types of games. Hostel rooms are descent and livable. I did not face any issue with infrastructure here.

reviews.review_heading: Affordable education for working professionals, the distance learning model is well-suited.
reviews.review_text: Pandit Sundarlal Sharma Open University is a state open university in Bilaspur, Chhattisgarh, with a campus spread over 70 acres. The university infrastructure includes administrative, academic, and examination buildings, a library, a bank, a canteen, and residential buildings for staff. The university website does not mention any on-campus hospital facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is the only open university in Chhattisgarh.
reviews.review_text: You have to choose a study centre for regular classes. Enough facilities will be provided in the study centre, and you will not have any problem. There is a good and clean environment. There are no hostel facilities, but PGs are available nearby. Tiffin services are also available in PGs.

reviews.review_heading: This is a great university for those who are working and preparing for other exams.
reviews.review_text: It is an open university, so we don't have access to traditional facilities. There are no regular classrooms, labs, or a dedicated campus environment. The university primarily offers flexibility for those who are working and preparing for other exams.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Physics Lab, Analog & Digital Electronics Lab, Basic Electrical & Electronic Engg Lab, Control System Lab, Database Management System Lab, Digital Communication Lab, Object Oriented Programming Lab, Electrical Drives Lab, Electrical Machine Design Lab, Engineering Graphics /Drawing Lab, Microprocessor & Microcontroller Lab, Power Electronics Lab, Multimedia Lab, Embedded Lab, Transducer & Sensor Lab, Analog Electronic Circuit Lab, Strength of Materials Lab, Soil Mechanics Lab, Fluid Mechanics Lab, Analog Communication Lab, Data Structure Lab

reviews.review_heading: Excellent campus and great support.
reviews.review_text: The campus has clean classrooms, good Wi-Fi, computer labs, a library filled with valuable books and resources, an infirmary, sports, etc. The entire infrastructure is designed to create a positive learning and living environment for students. The hostel is well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: All in all, it is a very good college to join with a very big campus and facilities.
reviews.review_text: I personally do not stay in hostels, but many of my friends stay in hostels, and they say it is very comfortable. Also, the infrastructure is very homely as there are ACs in classrooms, Wi-fi available, and we have two to three libraries with various books for students.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty and strong placements for BBA students.
reviews.review_text: I do not stay in a hostel, but students have mentioned that the hostel facilities are good, with proper food quality and hygiene maintained in the mess. It provides free Wi-Fi, air-conditioned classrooms, clean classrooms, and air-conditioned libraries.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty, courses, facilities, and connectivity. However, events are uncommon.
reviews.review_text: Multiple working Wi-Fi channels are available around the institute. Labs are well-maintained with capable machines. Classrooms are decently big, although some of them lack air-conditioning or have poorly maintained ACs. The library has a commendable collection of books; however, requisitions for any required book are entertained.

reviews.review_heading: It has good infrastructure and helpful faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Our college has clean classrooms, common rooms for students to relax, and hygienic washrooms. Sports competitions happen every year. There is a huge library and a computer lab with high-speed internet. There are AC classrooms with whiteboards. The food quality could be improved a bit. Four groups are divided into sports.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied and campus life is excellent.
reviews.review_text: The course infrastructure is decent. We have good labs and classrooms with AC. But the toilets are dirty of the college. Hostel facilities are average, with satisfactory food in the mess. Hostel has gym and playground for playing football and cricket. We have study room and recreation room.

reviews.review_heading: PCMT College has strong academics with growing infrastructure and industry exposure.
reviews.review_text: A large central library plus 2-3 division libraries. Well-equipped laboratories, including computer labs & a full Wi-Fi campus. Separate boys' and girls' hostels are available with comfortable rooms including a chair, table, and bed. The food quality is decent, and this college has good medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied with our course.
reviews.review_text: The college has excellent lab facilities, a good library, an enabled campus, and a good sports ground. No canteen facilities are available right now, but they may open soon. Hostel facilities are also available for outstation students at a very minimal cost. Overall, it is good.

reviews.review_heading: Strong clinical exposure, supportive faculty & vibrant campus life, but Scope for better equipment.
reviews.review_text: Faculty are good, helpful, understanding, and of average qualified. They can make future optometrists well-educated. Semesters are not too hard if we study well. 70% students pass the exam in each semester, but some students are not able to pass.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, good at average levels.
reviews.review_text: It has average college interior, not to much attractive but looks overall good. Wi-Fi is also available but poor connection level. Labs are clean and quite good. Classrooms are good but AC is not working well. There is a library but books are too poor condition and lack of books in the library.

reviews.review_heading: College is good in average condition.
reviews.review_text: It has average college interior, not to much attractive but looks overall good. Wi-Fi is also available but poor connection level. Labs are clean and quite good. Classrooms are good but AC is not working well. There is a library but books are too poor condition and lack of books in the library.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, the experience is good.
reviews.review_text: There are 2 computer labs with 20 & 30 desktops, and CCTV surveillance in entrances & classrooms also where students give exams. Few of my friends are staying in a hostel, & they said the rooms are good, & the food of the canteen is average as compared to price.

reviews.review_heading: College is good but the hostel facility is not good enough .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good, but the hostel is not. The hostel is moderate. There is no mess for food; you should go to the market and buy some food for yourself. The college provides medical facilities and has its own ambulance. The principal of the college also provides inspiration for sports and cultural functions.

reviews.review_heading: Navigating Mediocrity: A candid review of Pailan college of management and technology.
reviews.review_text: All classrooms have AC and the whole campus has free Wi-Fi. But the buildings have been under development for a long time. PCMT is not very big, like other colleges in West Bengal, with the same fee. There is better infrastructure at other colleges at the same price.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is not bad, it is an average college in every aspect.
reviews.review_text: Better infrastructure , like free Wi-Fi, AC Classrooms, free library and each day you can take your subject related book from our library . Very co - operative teachers are here for library. Hostel facility, mess and canteen is also good. There are different hostel present for boys and girls.
